title: StructuresMegaMore
description: This project adds structures and lore  in caves… and new moonlight items (for recipe need ghast tear)
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/g4l1AL6gGfc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>Expanded Structures
This mod adds 14 new structures to your world, enhancing your exploration experience with unique locations and rare treasures.
Explore 14 New Structures
Discover a variety of new builds scattered across your world. Each structure is designed to fit into the environment while providing new goals for your journey.
Featured Locations:
The Bank
The Bank is a massive structure filled with a large amount of valuable loot. However, finding one is a challenge, as it has a very rare spawn rate. If you manage to locate it, the rewards will be worth the effort.
Sky Island
High in the clouds, you can find the Sky Island. This floating oasis features a small lake and a chest filled with resources to help you on your adventure.
Cave with a Dried Ghast
Deep underground lies a mysterious cave containing a dried ghast. Inside this eerie location, you will also find torchflowers and the ghast itself.
Twilight Bastion
Unlike typical bastions, the Twilight Bastion is located in the Overworld. Exploration is key here, as the structure contains hidden loot that is considered very good for any player.
